title: Article outline (arabic-authoring-suite)
description: Schema for a long-form Arabic article outline. Consumed by scripts/author.py in v0.2+ to drive section-by-section drafting. Each section must cite at least one source from the fact pack; sections without sources cannot be drafted because the corpus-grounding discipline collapses at the outline stage.

title_ar.description: Article title in Arabic. The schema does not enforce Arabic script (some MSA titles include English brand names); the LLM prompt template enforces script in v0.2.

register.description: Register policy applied during drafting. Must match a register declared in arabic-corpus-toolkit/corpus/register-policies.json.

fact_pack_ref.description: Relative or absolute path to the fact pack file. The path is validated and source count is re-checked at draft time.

sections.description: Article body. Article register requires 2-4 sections per references/01-charter.md.

tags.description: Optional topic tags (used for retrieval, not authoring).

intent.description: What this section accomplishes for the reader. The LLM sees this verbatim; specificity directly drives prose quality.

source_refs.description: Citation keys ([1], [2], ...) from the fact pack that THIS section draws on. Sections with empty source_refs are rejected at draft time — the outline-grounding discipline lives here.

claims.description: Specific factual claims this section will support. Optional but recommended — claims plus source_refs is the strongest grounding signal.

word_budget.description: Target word count for this section. Sum across sections should fall in the article-level budget (500-2500).
